title: Token-addressed hover decision
description: A per-token (quran:S:A:W) hover gloss that OVERRIDES the surface-key TSV. Resolves norm_strict collisions the surface-key layer cannot represent (لَمْ/لِمَ، مَن/مِن، إِنْ/إِنَّ، أَمْ/أُمّ): same norm_strict key, but the vocalized surface (and iʿrāb) selects a per-token reading. Precedence: token decision > surface-key TSV > pending. The runtime artifact is JSONL (one object per line) at qamus-service/ref/fusha-hover-token-decisions.jsonl (gitignored); the live renderer (qamus_wbw/expand.py) applies it as the highest-precedence pass, exempt from the homograph denylist. Public record stays {src:'qamus',kind:'authored'}; internal_provenance may cite QAC/Tanzil/Quran.com/Tafsir-MCP but NONE leak publicly.

gloss.description: original qamus-authored English gloss for THIS token

surface.description: the vocalized surface at this loc (the disambiguator)

key.description: the norm_strict surface key this token would otherwise collide on

internal_provenance.description: internal-only; never shipped to the public artifact
